session.user:
Run the following command and report results:
pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/land/ -v
Report any failures or confirm all passing.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command for the land command tests.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on land command tests with verbose output

session.tool_result:
============================= test session starts ============================== platform linux -- Python 3.13.12, pytest-9.0.2, pluggy-1.6.0 rootdir: /home/runner/work/erk/erk configfile: pyproject.toml plugins: anyio-4.12.1, cov-7.0.0, xdist-3.8.0, asyncio-1.3.0 asyncio: mode=Mode.AUTO, debug=False, asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope=function, asyncio_default_test_loop_scope=function collected 121 items

[ 4%] tests/unit/cli/commands/land/pipeline/test_resolve_plan_id.py .. [ 5%] tests/unit/cli/commands/land/pipeline/test_resolve_target.py ..... [ 9%] tests/unit/cli/commands/land/pipeline/test_run_execution_pipeline.py ... [ 12%] . [ 13%] tests/unit/cli/commands/land/pipeline/test_run_validation_pipeline.py .. [ 14%] . [ 15%] tests/unit/cli/commands/land/pipeline/test_validate_pr.py .... [ 19%] tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_cleanup_and_navigate.py .............. [ 30%] ... [ 43%] tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py ........................ [ 63%] . [ 64%] tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_no_delete_flag.py ... [ 66%] tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_parse_argument.py ............ [ 76%] tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_render_land_script.py ........... [ 85%] tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_resolvers.py .......... [ 94%] tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_validate_pr_for_landing.py ....... [100%]
... [1 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant:
pytest passed: All 121 tests in the land command test suite passed in 0.84 seconds.
The test results show comprehensive coverage across all land command modules: - Pipeline tests (create_learn_issue, merge_pr, resolve_plan_id, resolve_target, execution, validation, validate_pr) - Land-specific tests (cleanup_and_navigate, determine_cleanup_type, dry_run, find_assignment, land_learn, no_delete_flag, parse_argument, render_land_script, resolvers, validate_pr_for_landing)
All tests are passing with no failures or errors.
